mapper.select: SELECT c.category as category, SUM(k.amount) as total, TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(k.trade_date, 'YYYY-MM') || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS yearMonth FROM kakeibo k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.username = #{username} AND k.trade_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND c.in_out = 'OUT' GROUP BY c.category, k.category_id, TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(k.trade_date, 'YYYY-MM') || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY yearMonth ASC, k.category_id

SELECT TO_CHAR(k.trade_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(CASE WHEN c.in_out = 'IN' THEN k.amount ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN c.in_out = 'OUT' THEN k.amount ELSE 0 END) AS outGo FROM kakeibo k JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.username = #{username} AND k.soft_delete = 1 AND k.trade_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC
